abilities.name: Concussive Spanner
abilities.desc: Your Spanner Smash will now apply Concussion to the target.ConcussionYour target is unable to critically strike and their total primary attributes are reduced by -5% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Boomshot
abilities.desc: Every 4th Scrap Shot now causes your next Scrap Shot within 15 seconds to deal 25% increased damage.

abilities.name: Modulator
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Modules by 20%.

abilities.name: Clockwork Ingenuity
abilities.desc: Increases the maximum health of your summons by 10%.

abilities.name: Mechanosoldier
abilities.desc: Increases the damage reduced by Kinetic Shield by -10% and its duration by 2 sec.

abilities.name: Mechsuit: Activate Jets
abilities.desc: Launch forward and slow your falling speed. When you hit the ground you blast nearby enemies for 275 Fire damage based on time in the air.

abilities.name: Haywired State!
abilities.desc: Casting Mechsuit abilities now causes your pet to enter a haywired state for 6 seconds.Haywired State!Auto attacks now zap up to 10 nearby enemies for 159 + 35% AP Stormstrike Damage and damaged enemies take 20% increased damage from your summons.

abilities.name: Healing Radiator
abilities.desc: Periodic healing done by Nanobot Reconstruction now restores 27 + 4.03% healing health to 5 allied players within 10 yds of the affected target.

abilities.name: Rejuvenating Gadget
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with Zap! now apply Rejuvenating Gas to up to 12 allies within 8 yards of your target that restores 15% of the value of the shot as health every 2 sec for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Regeneration Enhancement
abilities.desc: When you enter your Mechsuit, it now refunds 20% of your base mana, repeating every 20 sec while inside.

abilities.name: Bombs? BOMBS!
abilities.desc: Increases the detonation speed of Sticky Bomb by -1 sec and reduces its cooldown by -2 sec.

abilities.name: Inventor's Tool Belt
abilities.desc: Increases your and your pet's Intellect by 10% and you are both now unable to miss your attacks.

abilities.name: Frozen Bomb Launcher
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by your Sentry Turrets will now slow enemy movement speed by -15% for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Over-Repaired
abilities.desc: Increases the healing done by Repair Shot by 15%.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.desc: Reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 35% and increases your critical healing by 10%.

abilities.name: Stim Pack
abilities.desc: Effective healing with Stim Augmentation now reduces the cooldown of Med Pack by -3 sec.

abilities.name: Combat Symbiosis
abilities.desc: Electrify an allies' body, increasing their haste by 20% and causing damage dealt by them to heal nearby allies for 15% of the value. Lasts for 15 seconds, or 20 attacks.

abilities.name: Rocket Barrage
abilities.desc: Increases the amount of stacks of Tracer Augmentation by 5, and its duration by 7 sec, and causes damage dealt by Bomb Toss on enemies with 10 stacks to launch a Rocket Barrage at their location.Rocket Barrage (Damage)Deals 1290 + 17.5% AP + 11% fire SP Fire Damage to nearby enemies after 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Mana Capacitors
abilities.desc: Reduces the cost of Overcharge by -15% and reduces its cooldown by -10%.

abilities.name: Flamethrowing
abilities.desc: When you Bomb Toss, your Sentry Turret unleashes flames on your target, dealing 89+18+ranged AP*0.12+SPFI*0.4. Fire damage to enemies in a 30 yd line.

abilities.name: Machine Synergy
abilities.desc: Casting Scrap Shot now adds a stack of Machine Synergy to your active pet and Sentry Turret.Machine SynergyIncreases damage dealt by 5% and haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Goblin Depravity
abilities.desc: Air Strike now drops Tear Gas, dealing 132 + 11% nature SP + 100% AP Nature damage every 2 sec for 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Auto Resuscitation Device
abilities.desc: Attach a resuscitation device to your target ally for 20 seconds.When the target would otherwise die, they are instead healed for 50% of their maximum health.

abilities.name: Explosive Personality
abilities.desc: Increases your ranged attack power by 50% of your Intellect.

abilities.name: Macro-Gravity Zone
abilities.desc: Create a macro-gravity zone at target location for 8 seconds.Enemies within the zone have their movement speed slowed by -50% and gain 1 stack of Macro-Gravity every 1 sec.Macro-GravityAt 6 stacks, the affected enemy will be stunned for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Refined Gunpowder
abilities.desc: Increases your haste and your damage dealt against Mechanical creatures by 3%.

abilities.name: Rapid Fire Healing
abilities.desc: Casting Repair Shot or Emergency Heal now has a 15% chance to refresh a charge of Beacons.

abilities.name: Target Acquired
abilities.desc: Your Sticky Bomb Explosions and Spider Bomb now deal 30% increased damage when it strikes only 1 target.

abilities.name: Bomb Builder
abilities.desc: Increases your and your summons Fire Damage dealt by 5%.

abilities.name: Junker
abilities.desc: Casting Spanner Smash and Scrap Shot now increases your pet's attack power by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 2 times.

abilities.name: Mechanical Extender
abilities.desc: Casting Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now increases the chance to trigger Overload by 3% for 10 seconds, stacking 10 times.When Overload triggers, all stacks are consumed.

abilities.name: Grenadier
abilities.desc: When you reach 5 stacks of Napalm on a target you refresh 1 charge of Build: Firepot Drone.

abilities.name: Mechanical Synergy
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosion and Mechsuit abilities by 15%.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Mechsuit: Combustion and Mechsuit: Laser Beam now have a 40% chance to strike 2 additional times for 30% of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Flexible Thinking
abilities.desc: Increases Agility and Intellect by 4%.

abilities.name: Bomb Toss
abilities.desc: Lob a bomb at an enemy, dealing 36 + 30% ranged AP + 50% fire SP Fire damage and reducing their armor by -5% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

abilities.name: I'm The Creator Now
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by your summons now has a 40% chance to increase your attack power and spell power by 9 for 30 seconds, stacking 3 times.

abilities.name: Build: Oil-Spill Pylon
abilities.desc: Build an Oil-Spill Pylon at target location for 10 seconds, spilling oil in an 8 yd radius that reduces enemies movement speed by -60% and increases their Fire damage taken by you by 15%.Sticky Bomb Explosions and Firepot Drone deal 20% increased damage to enemies inside.

abilities.name: Mechanical Enhancements
abilities.desc: Reduces your damage taken from bleed effects by -10% and the duration of bleed effects on you by -20%.

abilities.name: Master Builder
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Build abilities by -50%.

abilities.name: Master Builder
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of all Build abilities by -25%.

abilities.name: Self-Sustaining Technology
abilities.desc: Damage or healing done by your pet or summons now heals you equal to 15% of the value. In addition, damage or healing done by you now restores health and mana to your pet equal to 15% of the value. Each of these effects can only occur once per sec.

abilities.name: Nanobot Cleanser
abilities.desc: Send Nanobots to an ally removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for up to 15 seconds.Nanobot Cleanser can only be sent to 1 target at a time and can't be dispelled.

abilities.name: Improved Emergency Heal
abilities.desc: Increases the healing and reduces the mana cost of Emergency Heal by -20%.

abilities.name: Macro Designer
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of your Beacons by 5 sec and Med Pack by 3 sec.

abilities.name: Fine Tuning
abilities.desc: Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, not critically healing now increases your critical strike chance by 1%, stacking 10 times, until your next effective critical heal.

abilities.name: Nanobot Swarm
abilities.desc: Send Nanobots to an ally, dealing 15 + 17.1% SP damage to nearby enemies every 4 sec for 1 minute. All threat generated by you is redirected to the target.Nanobot Swarm can only be sent to 1 target at time and cannot be dispelled.

abilities.name: Emergency Enhancer
abilities.desc: Zap! now causes your active Build abilities to zap the lowest health nearby ally, healing them for 490 + 90% healing.

abilities.name: Epiphany!
abilities.desc: Casting Beacon abilities now reduces the cooldown of My Greatest Invention! by -20 sec.

abilities.name: My Greatest Invention!
abilities.desc: Show off your Greatest Invention, healing party and raid members in a 30 yd radius for 823 + 65% healing every 2 sec for 9 seconds.

abilities.name: Tracer Augmentation
abilities.desc: Add a Tracer Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your ranged attacks to mark enemies for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times. After the duration they explode for 80 + 8% ranged AP + 15% fire SP Fire damage, increased based on stacks.Marked enemies are prevented from entering stealth or invisibility for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Backup Fuel
abilities.desc: Falling below 35% health now refreshes all charges of Rocket Boots.Can occur only once every 3 min.

abilities.name: Hasty Tech
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Scrap Shot and Repair Shot by -15%.

abilities.name: Maniacal
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sticky Bomb and Deploy Blast Mine by -2 sec.

abilities.name: Build: Spider Bomb
abilities.desc: Build a Spider Bomb that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage in an 8 yd radius.Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

abilities.name: Boom Hour
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Bomb Toss and Firepot Drone by 10%.

abilities.name: Hyperblast Barrage
abilities.desc: Unleash a barrage of shrapnel, dealing 831 + 36% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage to enemies in a line, applying a lesser Sticky Bomb to each target struck that deals 297 + 10% fire SP + 50% AP Fire damage after 3 sec.After 3 seconds, your active Sentry Turret will also fire a Hyperblast Barrage.

abilities.name: Flame Jets
abilities.desc: While inside your Mechsuit, damage dealt by your Scrap Shot and Makeshift Dynamite now applies Living Flame to the target.Living Flame (Damage)Deals 32 Fire Damage every 2 sec and increases the damage the target takes from your Mechsuit: Combustion by 10% for 4.5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Master Technician
abilities.desc: Scrap Shot and Mechsuit abilities now grants your Sentry Turret a stack of Master Technician, stacking 10 times.At 10 stacks, your Sentry Turret will unleash a beam dealing 725 + 75% fire SP + 40% AP Fire damage in a 25 yd line, piercing invulnerabilities.

abilities.name: Mechaplating
abilities.desc: Whenever your summons critically strike, reduce your and your pet's damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

abilities.name: Rocket Pack
abilities.desc: Fire critical strikes now reduce the remaining cooldown of Rockadier by -3 sec.

abilities.name: Mechsuit: Laser Beam
abilities.desc: Blast an enemy with a laser, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 18 as Fire Damage and forcing your pet to charge to the enemy for 24 Physical Damage.

abilities.name: Gazlowe's Wisdom
abilities.desc: You now spawn 2 Shrapnel Mines under your target when Sticky Bomb explodes.Shrapnel MineWhen you use Remote Detonation, deal 264 + 25% AP + 38.5% SP Physical damage to up to 5 enemies within 10 yds. The mine lasts 1 minute.

abilities.name: Overclocked Machine
abilities.desc: Overclock your pet for for 20 seconds, increasing its damage dealt by 20% and allowing it's attacks to trigger Hardwired Haymaker on the target enemy. Additionally, your pet will trigger Overclocked Smash every 5 sec.

abilities.name: Upgrade!
abilities.desc: Upgrade nearby Sentry Turrets to a Molten Grenade Turret for 1 minute.Molten Grenade TurretUpgrades the Sentry Turret to fire grenades, increasing its attack speed significantly and causing it to deal 133 Fire Damage in an 8 yd radius, plus an additional 95 + 15% fire SP + 8.5% AP Fire Damage over 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Clockwork Guardians
abilities.desc: Dealing ranged ability damage now gives you a 10% chance to instantly build 2 Clockwork Guardians to accompany you for 12 seconds that have a 50% chance to trigger Hardwired Haymaker for 12 seconds.Casting Well-Oiled Machine or Upgrade! instantly builds 2 Clockwork Guardians.Hardwired HaymakerUnleash a devastating haymaker that deals 50 + 15% ranged AP Fire Damage.

abilities.name: Emergency Circumvented
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Emergency Heal by 15% and allows the periodic healing done by Med Pack to critically strike.

abilities.name: The BIG Guns!
abilities.desc: Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, increases your ranged attack power by 3%.

abilities.name: Drone Striker
abilities.desc: Firepot Drone and Scrap Shot now deal 2% increased damage for each stack of Napalm on the enemy.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

abilities.name: Fine Tuned
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike and hit chance of you and your summons by 4%.

abilities.name: Resourceful Tech
abilities.desc: Your Zap! is now guaranteed to critically strike allies affected by Nanobots.

abilities.name: Field Medic
abilities.desc: Increases your and your summons critical strike chance by 5%.

abilities.name: Stim Augmentation
abilities.desc: Add a Stim Augmentation to your gun for 1 hour, causing your direct healing abilities to heal up to 3 nearby friendly players for an additional 20% of the amount healed.

abilities.name: Ventilation
abilities.desc: Direct magic damage taken now has a 50% chance to increase all magic resistances of allies within 8 yds of you by 15 for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Med Pack
abilities.desc: Toss a med pack to an ally, healing for 204 + 120% SP over 6 seconds and cleanses all bleed, poison and disease effects.

abilities.name: Turret Upgrade Z-15
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Sentry Turrets now has a 30% chance to cause 47 + 20% AP additional Nature damage and increase critical strike chance of the turret by 1%, stacking 5 times, for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Arclight Core
abilities.desc: Makeshift Dynamite now marks enemies for 6 seconds. The next damaging ability used on this target by your pet consumes the mark to deal 491 + 20% fire SP + 20% ranged AP Fire damage.

abilities.name: Build: Repulsion Unit
abilities.desc: Build a Repulsion Unit that periodically knocks nearby enemies back every 5 sec for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Build: Destructo-Bot
abilities.desc: Build a Destructo-Bot that you can see through and directly control.The bot is capable of exploding, dealing massive Fire damage to enemies nearby and disorienting them for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Build: Scrapmaw
abilities.desc: Build a Scrapmaw to accompany the Tinker until dismissed.

abilities.name: Bunker Operative
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Kinetic Shield, Discombobulate!, and Repulsion Unit by -20%.

abilities.name: Surprise Launch!
abilities.desc: When Rocket Launcher is used on enemies affected by Sticky Bomb it is now guaranteed to critically strike.

abilities.name: Air Strike
abilities.desc: Mark the target location for an Air Strike. After 7 seconds, it deals 1250 Fire damage to up to 12 enemies caught within the blast.This ability always critically strikes.

abilities.name: Rocket Engineering
abilities.desc: Direct harmful ability critical strikes now apply an additional stack of Tracer Augmentation to the target while active on the enemy.

abilities.name: Mechsuit: Combustion
abilities.desc: Launch a massive ball of fire at an enemy that also damages nearby enemies, dealing 70 + 20% ranged AP Fire damage.Usable while moving.

abilities.name: Slam the Cogs!
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by you and your summons by 4%.

abilities.name: Rocket Launcher
abilities.desc: Fire a powerful rocket at an enemy that deals 126 + 35% ranged AP + 35% fire SP Fire damage.

abilities.name: Scrapper
abilities.desc: Search and rummage through nearby debris, gaining 10 Scrap and 25 mana every 1 sec for 5 seconds.Not usable in combat.

abilities.name: Arclight Adept
abilities.desc: Increases the critical damage of your Mechsuit abilities by 15%.

abilities.name: Scrapshielding
abilities.desc: Your critical strikes now grant you a shield that absorbs 177 + 15% AP + 60% SP damage.

abilities.name: Trust the Science!
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Zap! by -5 sec.

abilities.name: Nanobot Reconstruction
abilities.desc: Send Nanobots to an ally, healing them for 420 over 1 minute.Nanobot Reconstruction can only be sent to 1 target at a time and cannot be dispelled.

abilities.name: Build: Restorative Beacon
abilities.desc: 3 Charges, 15 sec rechargeThrow down a restorative beacon for 15 seconds which projects a field that heals raid and party members in the area for 92 + 12% SP every 3 sec.

abilities.name: Mechanical Enhancements
abilities.desc: Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, the range of your offensive ranged abilities and Auto Shot is increased by 10 yds.

abilities.name: Rockadier
abilities.desc: Empowers the next 6 Scrap Shots or Rocket Launchers within 30 seconds deal additional Fire damage equal to 100% of the damage dealt to up to 10 enemies around the target.

abilities.name: Build: Spider Bomb Factory
abilities.desc: Build a Spider Bomb Factory in front of you for 20 seconds.For the duration, Bomb Toss and Rocket Launcher will summon 3 Spider Bombs, that will immediately run towards your target and detonate dealing 250 + 30% ranged AP Fire damage.Using Scrap Shot will redirect the Spider Bombs to your new target.

abilities.name: Nano-Repair Tech
abilities.desc: You and your pet now regenerate 3% of your maximum health every 8 sec.

abilities.name: Eureka!
abilities.desc: Direct healing critical strikes now increase the healing done by your next Repair Shot or Emergency Heal by 30% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Build: Noise Box
abilities.desc: Build a Noise Box for 15 seconds that periodically unleashes screeching noise on nearby enemies, interrupting spellcasts and preventing spells of that school from being cast for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Zap!
abilities.desc: Fires a long range zap of electricity that heals an ally for 254 + 150% healing.Scales with modifiers to Repair Shot.

abilities.name: Build: Battery Recharge Station
abilities.desc: Build a Battery Recharge Station for 30 seconds that allies can interact with once to replenish 15% maximum health and mana, and 50% maximum Rage, Energy, Focus, and Runic Power.Applies Depleting Battery to party and raid members within 40 yds.Depleting BatteryMovement speed increased by 10% for 30 seconds. Run to the Battery Recharge Station and charge your battery!Charged BatteryMovement speed increased by 30% for 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Cybernetic Revivification
abilities.desc: All nearby allies receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, your Alarm Beacon now dispels fear, charm, and sleep effects from 1 additional ally.

abilities.name: Rocket Turrets
abilities.desc: Allows Machine Synergy to stack 2 additional times and using Rocket Launcher now causes your Sentry Turret to also cast Rocket Launcher.Machine SynergyIncreases damage dealt by 5% and haste by 3%, stacking 3 times, for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Short Fuse
abilities.desc: Sparked and Ready now also increases the critical strike chance of Rocket Launcher by 20%.

abilities.name: Build: Firepot Drone
abilities.desc: 3 Charges, 10 sec rechargeBuild a Firepot Drone that flies towards your target, dropping a bomb along its path and exploding upon landing, dealing 182 + 17.5% ranged AP + 55% fire SP Fire damage in a 5 yd radius, leaving oil on the ground for 6 seconds that slows enemies within by -30%.

abilities.name: Build: Alarm Beacon
abilities.desc: 3 Charges, 15 sec rechargeThrow down an alarm beacon for 10 seconds, removing fear, charm and sleep effects from up to 1 ally within 20 yds every 1 sec.

abilities.name: Deathball
abilities.desc: Launch 3 Deathballs in a line, increasing in speed the further they travel.They explode when they come into contact with an enemy, dealing 1150 + 35% ranged AP Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased based on distance traveled.Bot and Build abilities reduce the cooldown of this ability by -2 sec.

abilities.name: Kinetic Shield
abilities.desc: Create magnetic shields of kinetic energy on an ally target for 8 seconds, reducing damage taken by -40% and making them immune to stun effects.Usable while stunned.

abilities.name: Sprocket Loaded
abilities.desc: Casting Makeshift Dynamite now resets the cooldown of your Mechsuit abilities.

abilities.name: Blazewrought Titan
abilities.desc: While inside your Mechsuit, all damage taken is reduced by -10% and dealing damage with Living Flame now grants a stack of Blazewrought Titan.Blazewrought TitanIncreases your magic penetration by -2 for 15 seconds, stacking 15 times. At 15 stacks, your damaging abilties become infused with fire dealing an additional 30% of the damage dealt instantly as Fire Damage and sundering your target and an additional nearby enemy.Blazewrought Sunder (Debuff)Increases your Fire and Nature Damage dealt to this target by 2% for 4 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Rocket Boots
abilities.desc: 3 Charges, 30 sec rechargeActivate your Rocket Boots, dispelling root effects and launching you forward.

abilities.name: Makeshift Dynamite
abilities.desc: 2 Charges, 8 sec rechargeGenerates 10 ScrapLoad dynamite into your gun and launch it at an enemy, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 12 as Fire damage.Usable while moving.

abilities.name: Efficiency
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of all spells and abilities by -10%.

abilities.name: I Need More Explosions!
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Sticky Bomb Explosions by 15%.

abilities.name: Explosive Inventor
abilities.desc: Spider Bomb Factory now also summons a Heavy Spider Bomb.Heavy Spider Bombs move slowly, and deal 1231 + 55% ranged AP Fire damage when they reach their target and slow their movement speed by -70% for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Explosives Expert
abilities.desc: Direct harmful ability critical strikes from you or your summons now restores 4% of your maximum mana.

abilities.name: Aftermath
abilities.desc: Casting Sticky Bomb now causes your next 2 Scrap Shots within 10 seconds to cast -50% faster and deal 25% increased damage.

abilities.name: Incendiary Bullets
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Scrap Shot by 15% and increases your chance to hit by 2%.

abilities.name: Duobombers
abilities.desc: Build: Spider Bomb now creates an additional Spider Bomb that rushes towards your target.

abilities.name: War Crimes / Tank Buster
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Explosive Augmentation and Tracer Augmentation now has a 50% chance to apply an additional stack of Napalm to enemies.Napalm (Damage)Fire Damage taken by you is increased and healing received reduced by -3% for 8 seconds. Stacks 10 times.

abilities.name: Buster Scope / Mega Scope
abilities.desc: Increases the critical damage of Rocket Launcher by 10%.

abilities.name: Medical Degree / Enhanced Procedures
abilities.desc: Increases the cooldown of Med Pack by 30 sec, but allows it to affect up to 4 additional targets around your ally.

abilities.name: Innate Brilliance / Function Over Form
abilities.desc: While Aether Augmentation is active, every 4th Scrap Shot now grants you Innate Brilliance.Innate Brilliance (Buff)Your next Scrap Shot has 5 yds increased range, deals 15% increased damage, and drains 125 + 10% ranged AP of your target's mana. Lasts 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Cutting Edge Technology / Rocket Bombardment
abilities.desc: Increases the tick rate and healing done of Nanobot Reconstruction by 20%.

abilities.name: Stim Shots / Bandage Gun
abilities.desc: Your Stim Augmentation now heals for an additional 10% of the amount healed.

abilities.name: J27 Upgrade / Electromagnetic Resistors
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of your Nanobots by -10% and they now last 10 additional sec.

abilities.name: Turbo Guns / Flak Guns
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of your Mechsuit: Combustion by 0.25 sec and its damage is increased by 20%.

abilities.name: Offensive Utility / Defensive Utility
abilities.desc: While in your Mechsuit, casting Sticky Bomb reduces the channel time of your next Gatling Gun within 5 seconds by -30%.

abilities.name: Augmechtation / Engine Augmentation
abilities.desc: Your Mechsuit now increases your damage by an additional 10% while active.

abilities.name: Cogmaster / Junkyard Loiter
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and gives ranged critical strikes a 50% chance to generate 3 Scrap.

abilities.name: Augmentor / Hacking the Enemy
abilities.desc: While Piercing Augmentation or Aether Augmentation is active, your ranged haste is increased by 10%.
